value.found_quote: When using Evaluations on the OpenAI Platform, in addition to evaluating OpenAI's native models, you can also evaluate a variety of external models. We support accessing third-party models (no API key required) and accessing custom endpoints (API key required).
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes the OpenAI Evaluations platform's support for running evals against third-party models (Google, Anthropic, Together, Fireworks) and custom external endpoints, including API-based evaluation — directly substantiating the claim. However, the page also clearly states the Evals platform is being deprecated: it will become read-only on October 31, 2026, and shut down on November 30, 2026, so the lifecycle_status is 'deprecated' (still functional during a transition window, but with a confirmed shutdown date).
